name: ProgressUpdatingEventArgs
summary: Event arguments used for the Application::ProgressUpdating event

properties.name: Canceled
properties.summary: Sets a value indicating whether the operation should be canceled.

properties.name: OverallFractionDone
properties.summary: Gets the fraction of the overall progress operation that has been done. Displayed in title bar of Navisworks progress dialog.

properties.name: Progress
properties.summary: Gets a reference to the Progress class instance relating to this Event.

properties.name: SubOperationFractionDone
properties.summary: Gets the fraction of the current progress sub-operation that has been done. Displayed in the progress bar of the Navisworks progress dialog.
